title: glochidion rugulosum
intro: Glochidion rugulosum, also known as the rough-leaved globe-flower, is a type of plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Glochidion rugulosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are often dried and used in traditional medicine.
